title: EutrophicationTRACIFactor
description: EutrophicationTRACIFactor: Single value indicator for Eutrophication (Version 1 North American standard) for a particular product or material.

Value.description: Value for this single factor indicator. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationTRACIPerQuantity measured in [kg N eq per unit].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
